title: draba wahlenbergii f. glabrata
intro: Draba wahlenbergii f. glabrata, also known as the smooth Draba, is a subspecies of the Draba wahlenbergii plant, a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Korean and Japanese herbalism, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Draba wahlenbergii f. glabrata include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and its ability to boost the immune system. Draba wahlenbergii f. glabrata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
